title: Dhirubhai Ambani University-SOL faces backlash over claims that it offered LL.M. programme in hybrid mode
description: Dhirubhai Ambani University - School of Law (DAU-SOL) recently came under scrutiny after allegations were made that it was offering its LL.M. programme in a combined hybrid online and offline mode, in violation of Bar Council of India (BCI) guidelines.As per a BCI directive issued on June 25, 2025 an LL.M. programme cannot be offered in the online or hybrid mode. The Council reasoned that online or distance learning legal education is not comparable to conventional classrooms due to a lack of in
